title: echinops hebelepis var. hebelepis
intro: Echinops hebelepis var. hebelepis, also known as Globe Thistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Globe Thistle are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Globe Thistle is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
